geography.data_source: BBMP ward boundaries 2023 for Bommanahalli and South zones; covers Jayanagar (all blocks), JP Nagar (phases 1-9), BTM Layout, Banashankari

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 ward-level data extrapolated with BBMP 2023 estimates; Jayanagar/JP Nagar among Bengaluru's most densely populated established residential areas; high literacy reflects established middle class

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round PLFS for urban Karnataka; median reflects established middle class — mix of government employees, educators, professionals; informal rate from ILO India Employment Report 2024 for established residential zones

commute_profile.data_source: BMRCL Green Line ridership data 2024 for south corridor stations; DULT CMP 2020; shorter commute distances due to central-south location; car ownership from RTO data 2023

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Moderate-high sensitivity profile — established residents with property stakes; examination sensitivity elevated due to numerous coaching centres (Jayanagar 4th Block corridor); high political mobilisation — historically active civic engagement in south Bangalore; from Lokniti-CSDS 2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: High clustering from long-established neighborhood networks and RWAs; Jayanagar known for strong community organization; estimated from IHDS-II urban residential social network patterns

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Jayanagar 4th Block shopping complex — one of Bangalore's oldest commercial centres; BBMP trade license data 2023; footfall from BMTC bus stop data and metro station exit counts
JP Nagar 6th Phase market area; BBMP street vendor survey 2022; serves large residential catchment
BTM Layout 2nd Stage commercial area; BBMP trade license data 2023; growing food and retail hub
Banashankari BDA complex and surrounding commercial area; BBMP data 2023; major BMTC bus hub increases transit dependency

data_source: Composite zone config from Census 2011, NSSO PLFS 78th Round, BMRCL Green Line 2024, DULT CMP 2020, BMTC 2023, BBMP 2023, RTO Bangalore Urban 2023
